Annotation system for SVG elements, custom exceptions, SVG to PDC conversion, and image routines.


## Files
- **[annotation.py](annotation.py.md)**: Implements an annotation system for SVG elements with support for highlights and transformations.
- **[exceptions.py](exceptions.py.md)**: Defines custom exceptions Svg2PdcError and Svg2PdcFormatError for error handling.
- **[pdc.py](pdc.py.md)**: Functions and classes for converting SVG to PDC format, including color conversion and command serialization.
- **[pebble_image_routines.py](pebble_image_routines.py.md)**: Image and color conversion routines for Pebble devices, supporting both color and b&w palettes.
- **[svg.py](svg.py.md)**: Converts SVG files to a PDC format for Pebble devices, handling SVG elements and annotations.
